params.param: Заполнение реестра остатков и оборотов для формы 110 (для контекста default, для tool adb)

object.name: get_entities
object.property: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'clientchr' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_clientchr, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'rf110restturnreg' AND module_name = 'rf110' THEN table_name END) AS table_rf110_rf110restturnreg, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'assetregistercor' AND module_name = 'assetreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_assetreg_assetregistercor, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'account' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_account, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'clientjurregister' AND module_name = 'clientjurreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_clientjurreg_clientjurregister, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'secdealrepo' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_secdealrepo, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'currency' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_currency, MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_psreg_psregister FROM md_entity2table WHERE (entity_name = 'clientchr' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'rf110restturnreg' AND module_name = 'rf110') OR (entity_name = 'assetregistercor' AND module_name = 'assetreg') OR (entity_name = 'account' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'clientjurregister' AND module_name = 'clientjurreg') OR (entity_name = 'secdealrepo' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'currency' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg')

object.name: param_clientchr_sql_filter
object.property: Фильтр на статус записи в Характерах клиента

object.name: 001_RF110_Reg_Acc2
object.property: CREATE TABLE tmp_001_RF110_Reg_Acc2_:calc_id: AS SELECT RF110.get_base_calc_id() as CalcID, t.* FROM ( select distinct a2.ID, a2.AccountNumber from DWR_tRF110Settings s inner join :RFAccGroupEl: a inner join :Account2: a2 on a2.AccountNumber = a.AccountMask and a2.DateBegin <= to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') and a2.DateEnd > to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') and a2.RowStatus = 'A' where s.RFFormProfileID = :rfprofile_f110: and s.Algorithm in ('F110_ALG_0','F110_ALG_4') group by a2.ID, a2.AccountNumber ) t

object.name: sql_001_Load_distr_002_RF110RestTurnReg_ACCDEMAND_ClientChr1_34_default
object.property:
CREATE TABLE tmp_sql_001_Load_distr_002_RF110RestTurnReg_ACCDEMAND_ClientChr1_34_default_:calc_id: AS SELECT RF110.get_base_calc_id() as CalcID, t.* FROM ( select distinct
ClientID as ClientID from :table_dwh_clientchr: where DateBegin <= to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') and DateEnd > to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') and :clientchr_sql_filter: and ClientCharacter in (1,34) --адвокат/нотариус, арбитражный управляющий ) t DISTRIBUTED BY (clientid)

object.name: 002_RF110RestTurnReg_ACCDEMAND
object.property:
INSERT INTO RF110RestTurnReg (dealid, accountid, objectid, calcid, accountnumber, clientid, loanrepokind, somerequiredattribute) SELECT dealid, accountid, objectid, calcid, accountnumber, clientid, loanrepokind, 'test' as somerequiredattribute FROM ( select :table_rf110_rf110restturnreg: as ID, :calc_id: as CalcID, reg.BranchID as BranchID, reg.ExternalClientID as ExternalClientID, reg.RowStatus as RowStatus, reg.VIP as VIP, reg.AccountID as AccountID, NVL(reg.ContractNumber, 'test') as ContractNumber, reg.DealID as DealID, reg.AccountNumber as AccountNumber, reg.Account2ID as Account2ID, reg.Account2Number as Account2Number, reg.CorrectObjectID as ObjectID, reg.SumType as SumType, reg.CorrectObjectBrief as ObjectBrief, reg.CorrectObjectID as CorrectObjectID, reg.CurrencyID as CurrencyID, null as SecCategory, reg.ClientID as ClientID, coalesce(cjr.ClientType,reg.ClientType) as ClientType, reg.Resident as ClientIsResident, cjr.OwnershipFormID as ClientOwnershipFormID, cjr.Authority as ClientAuthority, case when chr.ClientID is not null then 'CMN_BIN_YES' else 'CMN_BIN_NO' end as IsLawyerNotary, cjr.OffshoreResident as MinusLevy, case when coalesce(cjr.IsFinancial,'CMN_BIN_NULL') = 'CMN_BIN_NULL' then 'CMN_BIN_NO' else cjr.IsFinancial end as IsFinOrg, cjr.IsClearingMember as IsClearingMember, reg.PaymentDelay as PaymentDelay, reg.PaymentSumRur as OutRestRub, reg.PaymentSumVal as OutRestVal, reg.AccountName as AccountName, reg.ClientName as ClientName, NULL as LinkAccountID, NULL as LinkAccountNumber, NULL as LinkAccount2Number, NULL as LinkCurrencyCode, reg.SecurityID as SecurityID, enum2str(sdr.DealKind) as LoanREPOKind, null as SecKind, reg.SecPortfolioID as SecPortfolioID, case when reg.ClientID != acc.ClientID then 'CMN_BIN_YES' else 'CMN_BIN_NO' end as IsLoanGuarantor, cur.Type as CurrencyType, cur.Code as CurrencyCode, enum2str(acc.openingreason) as AccountOpeningReason, NULL as DepositKind, DECODE(cjr.COUNTRYCODE, '996', 'CMN_BIN_YES', 'CMN_BIN_NO') as IsInternational290FZ, reg.ParentDealID, reg.ParentContractNumber, reg.AccountRole as AccountRole from :table_assetreg_assetregistercor: reg inner join tmp_001_RF110_Reg_Acc2_:calc_id: a on a.Account2Number = reg.Account2Number inner join :table_dwh_account: acc on acc.ID = reg.AccountID and acc.DateBegin <= to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') and acc.DateEnd > to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') left join :table_clientjurreg_clientjurregister: cjr on cjr.CalcID = :calc_clientjurreg_id: and cjr.ClientID = reg.ClientID left JOIN tmp_sql_001_Load_distr_002_RF110RestTurnReg_ACCDEMAND_ClientChr1_34_default_:calc_id: chr on chr.ClientID = reg.ClientID left join :table_dwh_secdealrepo: sdr on sdr.DateBegin <= to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') and sdr.DateEnd > to_date(':date_end:','yyyymmdd') and sdr.RowStatus = 'A' and sdr.MainDealID = reg.DealID left join :table_dwh_currency: cur on cur.ID = acc.CurrencyID where reg.CalcID = :calc_astreg_id: and reg.LevelGroup = 0 and reg.RowStatus = 'A' and (substr(reg.Account2Number,1,3) = '706' or abs(reg.ParentAccountID) != 1 )
) t

object.name: 003_RF110RestTurnReg_ACCRSRV
object.property: with b as ( select config_type from config_table where config_group = 'reports' ), a as ( select max(config_type) as config_max_type from b ) select 1 as test from test_table t cross join a where t.config_type in (select config_type from b)

object.name: applySettings
object.property: select dealid, :sett.strnum: from register where account2 = :sett.account2:

object.name: 001_RF110RestTurnReg_QUALITY
object.property:
UPDATE RF110RestTurnReg trg SET fininstrcategory = src.fininstrcategory, datefrom = src.datefrom FROM (
with b as (
select 1 as t from tbl) select r.DealID, r.FinInstrCategory, r.DateFrom from :table_psreg_psregister: r where r.CalcID = :calc_psregister_id: and r.RowStatus = 'A' and r.tt in (select 1 from b) ) src WHERE trg.calcid = :CALC_ID: AND trg.dealid = src.dealid
